title: muellera lutea
intro: Muellera lutea, also known as Imlil or Chiretta, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its yellow flowers and multiple medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Muellera lutea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Muellera lutea is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
